Lyrics.text:
Jeso hany fiereko
Sady fiononako,
Izy irery no jereko
F'Izy no Mpamonjiko
(Mpamonjiko)

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
O! afeno,
Tompo tia, ô afeno
Ao ambany elatrao,
Dia ho tody Aminao.
(Aminao)

Raha indro manirery
Mahatsiaro toa nafoy
Andrandraiko ny fijery;
Ianao tsy mahafoy.
(Tsy mahafoy)

Eo am-pototr'ilay hazo
Izay nihomboanao
Eo ny foko no hahazo
'Zany fiadananao.
(Fiadananao)

Tsy ho ela kely sisa
Raha ho avy Ianao,
Vavahadim-paradisa
No hidirako izao.
(Tsy ho ela izao)
